# zenanalyze public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenanalyze.txt 173 lines (supported surface) | zenanalyze.features.txt 13 added (features: experimental,hdr) | zenanalyze.internal.txt 11 lines (11 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

pub struct feature::AnalysisQuery
pub const fn feature::AnalysisQuery::features(&self) -> feature::FeatureSet
pub const fn feature::AnalysisQuery::new(feature::FeatureSet) -> Self
pub struct feature::AnalysisResults
pub fn feature::AnalysisResults::from_packed(&[(u16, f32)]) -> core::result::Result<Self, feature::PackError>
pub const fn feature::AnalysisResults::geometry(&self) -> feature::ImageGeometry
pub fn feature::AnalysisResults::get(&self, feature::AnalysisFeature) -> core::option::Option<feature::FeatureValue>

pub fn feature::AnalysisResults::require(&self, feature::FeatureSet) -> core::result::Result<(), feature::MissingFeatures>
pub const fn feature::AnalysisResults::source_descriptor(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor

pub const feature::FeatureSet::SUPPORTED: Self
pub const feature::FeatureSet::ZENJPEG_PICKER_V1_1: Self

pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::intersect(self, Self) -> Self
pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::intersects(self, Self) -> bool
pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::is_empty(self) -> bool
pub fn feature::FeatureSet::iter(self) -> feature::FeatureSetIter

pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::new() -> Self
pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::union(self, Self) -> Self

pub const fn feature::FeatureSet::without(self, feature::AnalysisFeature) -> Self

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum AnalyzeError
pub AnalyzeError::Convert(alloc::string::String)
pub AnalyzeError::Internal(alloc::string::String)
pub AnalyzeError::InvalidInput(alloc::string::String)
pub AnalyzeError::OutOfMemory
pub AnalyzeError::OutOfMemory::bytes_requested: core::option::Option<usize>
pub fn analyze_features(zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, &feature::AnalysisQuery) -> core::result::Result<feature::AnalysisResults, AnalyzeError>

pub fn try_analyze_features_rgb8(&[u8], u32, u32, &feature::AnalysisQuery) -> core::result::Result<feature::AnalysisResults, AnalyzeError>
